plans.title: Plan Management
plans.subtitle: Create and manage subscription plans for your customers.
plans.yearlyPromo: Get 2 months free with annual plans
plans.editTip1: Click on feature icons (✓/🔒) to toggle plan availability
plans.editTip2: Use the star icon to set a plan as featured
plans.editTip3: Click the trash icon to delete plans or features
plans.editTip4: Edit plan names and subtitles by clicking on them
plans.editTip5: Click "Save Changes" to save all pending modifications
plans.unsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes - remember to save!

addPlanModal.title: Add New Plan
addPlanModal.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g., Perfect for growing businesses that need advanced features and priority support
addPlanModal.subtitle: Subtitle

addFeatureModal.title: Add New Feature
addFeatureModal.failedToAdd: Failed to add feature. Please try again.
